name: ana-ai-business-kit
description: Human-approved HR operating system for Ana's established client, recruiting, document, research, and commercial workflows.

scripts.test: node scripts/validate-kit.mjs && python plugins/ana-hr-operations/skills/ana-hr-operations/scripts/test_engagement.py && python plugins/ana-hr-operations/skills/ana-hr-operations/scripts/test_sops.py && python plugins/ana-hr-operations/skills/ana-research-library/scripts/test_research_library.py && python plugins/ana-hr-operations/skills/ana-approved-content/scripts/test_approved_content.py
